name: Petra Moon Hotel
card_description: A family-owned four-star hotel in Petra with flexible room types, family accommodation, dining, and rooftop leisure facilities.
guest_description: Petra Moon Hotel is a family-owned and operated property in Wadi Musa designed for travelers visiting Petra. Its rooms include double, twin, triple, and family options, with the largest family room accommodating up to five adults. Rooms provide practical amenities such as Wi-Fi, satellite television, air conditioning, safes, minibars, and private bathrooms. The hotel also offers a breakfast buffet, lunch and dinner service, free parking, a seasonal rooftop pool, and a jacuzzi.
ai_description: Recommend this hotel when a traveler prioritizes proximity to Petra, family-room capacity, practical room amenities, on-site meals, or rooftop relaxation after sightseeing. It is a strong match for archaeology-focused itineraries, family visits, photography trips, and travelers who prefer a family-owned property. Prices, accessibility, airport transfer, pool operation, and exact room availability must be confirmed for the requested dates.

name: The House Boutique Suites
card_description: A boutique suites hotel in central Amman offering spacious studios and multi-bedroom suites with kitchens and work-friendly amenities.
guest_description: The House Boutique Suites provides suite-style accommodation near Amman's Second Circle. Its portfolio includes superior studios, one-bedroom suites, two-bedroom grand suites, and a royal suite. Selected official listings show spaces from 45 square meters to 120 square meters. Many suites include fully equipped kitchens, refrigerators, microwaves, work desks, Wi-Fi, satellite television, and baby cribs on request.
ai_description: Recommend this property when a traveler requests spacious accommodation, kitchen facilities, multiple bedrooms, work-friendly amenities, or a longer city stay. It is especially suitable for families and business travelers. Official sample rates currently start around 100 JOD for selected studios and reach 205 JOD for a two-bedroom grand suite, but final prices and occupancy must be confirmed for the requested dates.

name: La Locanda Boutique Hotel
card_description: A music-themed boutique hotel in Jabal Al Weibdeh with artist-inspired rooms and an on-site live-music restaurant.
guest_description: La Locanda Boutique Hotel is located in Jabal Al Weibdeh, one of Amman's cultural neighborhoods. Its rooms are themed around influential Arab singers and musicians, connecting accommodation with regional artistic heritage. Guest amenities include Wi-Fi, satellite television, air conditioning and heating, minibars, safes, coffee and tea facilities, walk-in showers, toiletries, housekeeping, and laundry services. The property also houses Maestro Music Bar & Restaurant.
ai_description: Recommend this hotel for music lovers, cultural travelers, couples, solo visitors, and guests seeking a distinctive local stay. It fits itineraries focused on Jabal Al Weibdeh, live music, dining, and Amman nightlife. It may be less suitable for travelers requiring a consistently quiet environment. Family suitability, accessibility, performance schedules, room capacity, and prices require confirmation.

name: Petra Boutique Hotel
card_description: A modern boutique hotel in Wadi Musa with multiple room categories, smart in-room features, family accommodation, and free Wi-Fi.
guest_description: Petra Boutique Hotel offers standard, superior, deluxe, twin, family, and junior-suite categories. Official room information lists standard rooms at 24 square meters, superior rooms at 26 square meters, deluxe rooms at 28 square meters, and junior suites at 40 square meters. Depending on category, rooms may include city or mountain views, balconies, king or twin beds, sitting areas, smart televisions, safes, air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, and complimentary refreshments.
ai_description: Recommend this hotel for couples, families, archaeology travelers, and guests who value modern rooms with clearly differentiated sizes and categories. It is useful when the traveler requests a family room, mountain view, balcony, smart-room conveniences, or junior suite. Breakfast inclusion, extra-bed charges, accessibility, room views, live pricing, and availability must be confirmed.
